content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 5.6.1/5.6.3 WARN — Custom star gate routes ≥4-star users to a direct `write-review` URL while diverting unhappy users to a feedback page (App/RatingGateView.swift:19-25), bypassing `SKStoreReviewController`/`requestReview`; metadata also solicits "rate us 5 stars" (fastlane/metadata/en-US/description.txt:1).
Pierre: Apple treats review gating — filtering out negative reviewers before they reach the App Store — as rating manipulation, and requires the system review prompt rather than custom star UIs linked to write-review URLs. Here the pre-prompt explicitly keeps unhappy users off the store, and the description begs for 5 stars. Replace this flow with `StoreKit.requestReview` triggered contextually, remove the sentiment filter, and delete the "rate us 5 stars" wording from metadata.
